The Miraheze crisis was a crisis where Miraheze abruptly announed their shutting down starting on June 15 2023. It was over a strange situation related to the global ban of a certain user. In the end it got resolved by merging with another wiki farm.

[[Category:Great November Outage]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
